top_priorities.title: Promote official WNBA mobile data to primary model source
top_priorities.evidence: Official player logs/team dash/player dash are ready. Rows: game=6, team=17, player=337.
top_priorities.recommended_change: Use official_mobile_playergamelogs_v21, official_mobile_team_dash_base_v21, and official_mobile_player_dash_base_v21 as primary feature inputs before SportsDataverse fallback.
top_priorities.safety_gate: Safe: read-only feature input promotion; no formula change until backtest.

top_priorities.title: Separate model signal quality from execution fill quality
top_priorities.recommended_change: Keep two scorecards: model recommended line/edge and actual execution fill/CLV. Do not let multiple fills of one signal distort model hit rate.

top_priorities.title: Keep Hermes in manual approval during model upgrade
top_priorities.recommended_change: Maintain MANUAL_APPROVAL_REQUIRED and MODEL_SAMPLE_LOCK until V21 backtest demonstrates stable improvement.
top_priorities.safety_gate: Required: no auto-betting or threshold changes.

top_priorities.title: Add market consensus and line-shopping range to model context
top_priorities.evidence: market_features_v21 has 5 events. Average total range=1.0.
top_priorities.recommended_change: Add market_total_median, market_total_range, and market_total_books as non-predictive context gates: avoid overreacting when book range is wide; prioritize best available line versus consensus.
top_priorities.safety_gate: Safe: context/gating only; do not alter projected total directly until measured.

top_priorities.title: Introduce V21 feature audit before changing projected total formula
top_priorities.evidence: game_model_features_v21 has 6 games; usable projection/line edge rows=6; avg abs edge=3.4933333333333336.
top_priorities.recommended_change: Run a correlation/backtest layer that compares projection_minus_line against result, CLV, and execution P/L before applying any formula weights.
top_priorities.safety_gate: Gate: no formula change until backtest sample is large enough and audit improves.
